body_txt: Majorette and cheerleader batons aren't designed for combat, but in fiction they can be turned into an Improvised Weapon . They could be used as a blunt weapon, a Matchstick Weapon (if it's a fire baton), or maybe as a Magic Wand of some sort. This trope is about any instances when majorette/cheerleader batons are used in battle. Compare Magic Wand , Batter Up! , Martial Arts Staff , and Spectacular Spinning . See also Frills of Justice . Not to be confused with Lawman Baton .
